g.title: Tier2_RenderGraph
g.text: miki Tier2 RenderGraph — Compat Vulkan 1.1+ (No Mesh Shader)
21 passes · Vertex+MDI · CSM · GTAO · TAA · LL-OIT · Single Queue · CPU Frustum Culling

g.title: gbuf_fwd
g.text: frag DSPBR per-draw → GBuffer MRT (replaces T1 VisBuffer+MatResolve)

g.title: deferred
g.text: fullscreen-tri, CPU-sorted light UBO ≤256, no clustered grid

g.title: taa
g.text: Halton jitter, YCoCg clamp, motion reject
